Creator's note

Hey hey! So like I got bored and then remembered this guy existed and decided to make him into a bot! 😈😈

I watched this video on yt abt this guy a long time ago during quarantine and then now with the whole marvel thing with Robert Downey Jr and I suddenly realized... this character HAS potential... so... here's Victor Werner Von Doom

(I didn't even know Werner was his middle name😭🙏)
